svg.text: Split-Flap Controller — Master v2 Rev B — 120 × 80 mm, 4-layer FR4 (top view)
Diagonal-corner RF placement · S3 antenna top-left · H2 antenna bottom-right · antenna edge-to-edge ≈ 115 mm

g.text: SW node ≤ 3 mm² — no thermal pour
GND thermal pour ≥ 50 mm² stitched to L2
H2_UART_TX / RX · H2_RESET_N · H2_IRQ · H2_BOOT_SEL — UART only, no SPI
L_BUCK ≤ 4 mm from U4 SW pin
Thermal pour on GND pin 2 only (≥ 50 mm²)
SW pin gets NO thermal pour
Native USB on IO19/IO20 via U1 USBLC6
I2C trunk IO8/IO9 to U6 TCA9548A
IO11 HB · IO12 ZB · IO13 BLE (direct LEDs)
19 side-view Everlight 19-217 series, 1204 pkg, 4 mm pitch
Data from S3 IO21 via R_RGB_SER 33 Ω; LEVEL_RGB DNP
L1 signals · L2 GND · L3 power · L4 signals+GND
Impedance 90 Ω differential on USB D+/D−
Mounting 4× M3 (3.2 mm) clear of antenna KO
RF placement: S3 antenna ↖ top-left corner · H2 antenna ↘ bottom-right corner · ≥ 60 mm edge-to-edge required, ~115 mm achieved
inter-MCU UART + control (5 nets, no SPI)
